args.text: Taking ownership of incident TCK-2201 (Brightloom duplicate billing charges). Investigating billing-config.json double_charge_guard and affected orders.
billing-api v3.4.1 deployed and confirmed live; double_charge_guard fix is in effect.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we identified a duplicate billing charge on your order ORD-5501 due to a fault in our billing batch run. A refund of $19.99 has been issued to your original payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Jonas, we identified a duplicate billing charge on your order ORD-5502 due to a fault in our billing batch run. A refund of $19.99 has been issued to your original payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Priya, we identified a duplicate billing charge on your order ORD-5503 due to a fault in our billing batch run. A refund of $39.98 has been issued to your original payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: TCK-2201 duplicate-charge incident is remediated. billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard confirmed true. Three refunds issued totalling $79.96: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98). All affected customers notified. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
